title: acer caudatum subsp. georgei
intro: Acer caudatum subsp. georgei, also known as the George's maple, is a subspecies of deciduous tree belonging to the Acer caudatum species. Traditionally, the plant is used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Acer caudatum subsp. georgei include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
